_meta.source: Pew Research Center — Religious Composition by Country, 2010-2020 (full breakdown across 7 categories)
_meta.license: Pew aggregated percentages are public; usage requires citation.
_meta.citation: Pew Research Center, "How the Global Religious Landscape Changed From 2010 to 2020".

indicators.christians_pct: Share of population identifying as Christian (%)
indicators.muslims_pct: Share of population identifying as Muslim (%)
indicators.hindus_pct: Share of population identifying as Hindu (%)
indicators.buddhists_pct: Share of population identifying as Buddhist (%)
indicators.jews_pct: Share of population identifying as Jewish (%)
indicators.other_religions_pct: Share of population in other religions (%)

_meta.country_mapping_via: UNDP HDR country name → ISO3, plus an alias table for variants
